name: HoneycombConnector
description: Connects to the Honeycomb observability API (api.honeycomb.io / api.eu1.honeycomb.io) using a Honeycomb Environment API key (X-Honeycomb-Team header). Manages datasets, columns, saved queries, query results, markers, triggers, boards, SLOs, and notification recipients; ingests events via /events/{dataset}.

install_fields.label: Honeycomb API Key
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your Honeycomb Environment API key
install_fields.help: Environment-level API key from Honeycomb → Environment Settings → API Keys. Sent in the X-Honeycomb-Team header on every request (NOT Authorization: Bearer).

install_fields.label: Region
install_fields.help: 'us' for honeycomb.io (default), 'eu' for eu1.honeycomb.io. Ignored if base_url is set.

install_fields.label: API Base URL
install_fields.help: Override only if your organization routes Honeycomb traffic through a proxy. Leave blank to use the region default.

install_fields.label: Default Dataset
install_fields.help: Optional default dataset slug used as a fallback for methods that accept a dataset parameter.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Client-side soft cap on outbound requests per minute. Default is 100.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates the API key by calling GET /auth and persists the configuration.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: API-key auth has no consent flow — wraps the configured api_key into a TokenInfo for the platform.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Honeycomb API connectivity by calling GET /auth.

apis.name: Sync Datasets
apis.description: Syncs Honeycomb dataset metadata (name, description, columns) into the Shielva knowledge base.

apis.name: Auth Info
apis.description: Returns team, environment, and api_key_access info from GET /auth.

apis.name: List Datasets
apis.description: Lists all datasets visible to the API key (GET /datasets).

apis.name: Get Dataset
apis.description: Fetches a single dataset by slug (GET /datasets/{slug}).

apis.name: Create Dataset
apis.description: Creates a new dataset (POST /datasets). Requires Configuration scope.

apis.name: List Columns
apis.description: Lists all columns for a dataset (GET /datasets/{slug}/columns).

apis.name: List Queries
apis.description: Lists saved queries for a dataset (GET /queries/{slug}).

apis.name: Create Query
apis.description: Creates a query spec on a dataset (POST /queries/{slug}). Returns a query id usable in run_query().

apis.name: Get Query
apis.description: Fetches a query spec (GET /queries/{slug}/{id}).

apis.name: Run Query
apis.description: Kicks off async query execution (POST /query_results/{slug}). Poll get_query_result() until complete=true.

apis.name: Get Query Result
apis.description: Polls a query result by id (GET /query_results/{slug}/{rid}).

apis.name: List Markers
apis.description: Lists markers for a dataset (GET /markers/{slug}).

apis.name: Create Marker
apis.description: Creates a marker on a dataset timeline (POST /markers/{slug}). Typical use: record deploys.

apis.name: List Triggers
apis.description: Lists alert triggers for a dataset (GET /triggers/{slug}).

apis.name: Create Trigger
apis.description: Creates an alert trigger (POST /triggers/{slug}). Threshold must be {op, value}; recipients is a list of {type, target}.

apis.name: List Boards
apis.description: Lists boards in the environment (GET /boards).

apis.name: Get Board
apis.description: Fetches a single board by id (GET /boards/{id}).

apis.name: List SLOs
apis.description: Lists SLOs for a dataset (GET /slos/{slug}).

apis.name: List Recipients
apis.description: Lists notification recipients (email / Slack / webhook / PagerDuty) (GET /recipients).

apis.name: Send Event
apis.description: Ingests a single event row into a dataset (POST /events/{slug}). Every top-level key in the event becomes a column.
